goal: Attention queue resolve/defer mutations — schema evolution + backend endpoints

acceptance_criteria.description: Migration SQL adds to migration.reconciliation: resolved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, resolved_by VARCHAR(200), resolution_note TEXT. Adds DEFERRED to migration.risk status CHECK constraint (OPEN|ACKNOWLEDGED|MITIGATED|CLOSED|DEFERRED). Also updates the status validation in risk_handlers.go UpdateRisk handler to accept DEFERRED.

PATCH /api/v1/migration/engagements/{id}/attention/{itemId}/resolve accepts {source: 'RISK'|'RECONCILIATION', resolution_note: string}. For RISK source, sets migration.risk.status to 'CLOSED'. For RECONCILIATION source, sets migration.reconciliation.resolved to true. Both set resolved_by from JWT sub claim and resolution_note. Returns 200 with updated attention item JSON.

PATCH /api/v1/migration/engagements/{id}/attention/{itemId}/defer accepts {source: 'RISK'|'RECONCILIATION', resolution_note: string}. For RISK source, sets status to 'DEFERRED'. For RECONCILIATION source, sets resolution_note recording deferral reason (resolved remains false). Returns 200 with updated attention item JSON.
Only unresolved items can be resolved or deferred — already-closed risk (status=CLOSED) or already-resolved reconciliation (resolved=true) returns 409 Conflict with {error: 'already_resolved'}.
Invalid source value returns 400 Bad Request with {error: 'invalid_source'}. Item not found returns 404 with {error: 'not_found'}.
Both endpoints require auth middleware and editor-or-above role. Unauthorized returns 403 with {error: 'forbidden'}.
WebSocket broadcasts attention_resolved and attention_deferred events with {item_id, source, engagement_id} payload to engagement members.
Activity log event created for each resolve/defer action with actor, item_id, source, and resolution_note.
Cross-source ID mismatch: PATCH resolve with a valid risk_id but source='RECONCILIATION' returns 404 (not accidentally resolving the wrong record type). Same for valid recon_id with source='RISK'.

critical: Migration adds resolved/resolved_by/resolution_note columns to reconciliation table AND DEFERRED to risk status CHECK
PATCH endpoints use auth middleware — editor or owner role required
Resolve/defer dispatches to correct underlying table based on source field (risk vs reconciliation)
RLS enforced — risk table scoped via engagement_id, reconciliation via batch.engagement_id join
resolved_by comes from JWT sub claim, not request body
Only unresolved items can transition — enforce at DB query level with WHERE clause, not just handler
high: WebSocket broadcasts attention_resolved/attention_deferred to engagement members
Tests cover: resolve RISK success, resolve RECONCILIATION success, defer both, already-resolved (409), unauthorized (403), not-found (404), invalid source (400)
Activity log event created for audit trail
Routes registered in RegisterRoutes() in api/handlers.go — required for serve() test helper to work
medium: Bulk resolve/defer endpoint for multiple items in one request
